summary: A clip from a FOX59 news segment. Two anchors sit at a news desk beside a FOX59 CRIME TRACKER graphic. The segment cuts to footage of gloved hands in a lab handling a small dropper bottle and a swab among packaged supplies. The lower-third reads ACCUSED SERIAL RAPIST CHARGED, NORTH SIDE.
